listings.title: Sugar Pea Boutique
listings.description:
Sugar Pea Boutique is a sister-owned children’s boutique offering thoughtfully curated clothing and accessories for babies and kids. We specialize in trendy, comfortable, and unique styles that make everyday moments feel a little more special.

From playful prints to soft, high-quality fabrics, every piece is chosen with both style and practicality in mind—because we know little ones need to move, play, and grow in what they wear.

Whether you’re shopping for everyday wear, special occasions, or the perfect gift, we’re here to bring “a little sugar, a lot of style” to your family.

listings.title: The Lantern Boutique
listings.description: At The Lantern Boutique, we specialize in custom fabrication and offer a curated selection of unique gifts, holiday and religious items, home décor, kitchenware, and delightful novelty products. Our passion for creativity and craftsmanship shines through in every piece, making us your go-to destination for thoughtful, personalized treasures that light up your home and celebrate life’s special moments. Discover the perfect blend of quality and charm at The Lantern Boutique!

listings.title: AsherKate
current_locations: Studio and Warehouse in Katy [Open to the public Tues & Thurs or by appt]

listings.title: Daecour
listings.description:
Daecour is a curated destination for globally inspired, handcrafted goods designed to bring beauty, intention, and a sense of calm into everyday living. Sourcing from artisans around the world, Daecour focuses on pieces made from natural and organic materials—each selected for its quality, story, and ability to transform a space.

From statement furniture and thoughtfully chosen home décor to high-quality incense, handmade gifts, and heirloom leather journals, every item is meant to be more than decorative—it’s meant to be felt. Rooted in a love for craftsmanship and mindful living, Daecour invites you to slow down, reconnect, and create spaces that feel grounded, personal, and meaningful.

listings.title: MeadowRidge Bee Farm
listings.description:
MeadowRidge Bee Farm is a small, family-owned apiary based in Central Illinois, dedicated to sustainable beekeeping and the creation of high-quality, hive-based products. Since 2016, we’ve been raising honey bees with care, producing raw, unfiltered honey that reflects the unique blooms of each season.

In addition to our honey harvests, we craft a full line of bath, body, and home products using ingredients from the hive—including beeswax, propolis, and royal jelly. From nourishing skincare to handcrafted goods, every product is thoughtfully made to bring the natural benefits of the hive into everyday life.

listings.title: Enchanted Art Studio
listings.description: Enchanted Art Studio offers a whimsical collection of handmade goods that blend witchy Cottagecore aesthetics with heartfelt mental health advocacy. Our creations include UV DTF-wrapped glassware, resin art, keychains, suncatchers, car charms, and home décor—each piece thoughtfully designed to spark joy, encourage self-expression, and bring a bit of magic into everyday life. Every item is crafted with care using high-quality materials, real florals, crystals, and enchanting color palettes inspired by nature and healing.

listings.title: Proverbify Mercantile
listings.description:
Proverbify Mercantile was born from the belief that scent can do more than smell good, it can tell a story, set an intention, and stir the soul. Inspired by the quiet power of proverbs, affirmations, and ancestral wisdom, every product we create is designed to bring a sense of peace, presence, and purpose into your space.
We believe in:

Intentional Living: Every item should bring meaning, not just beauty.

Everyday Rituals: Warm the wax melt. Take the breath. Let the words speak.

Wisdom for the Soul: Proverbs, quotes, and affirmations that uplift or kickstart — whichever you need.

Fragrance as a Feeling: Our scents are made to ground, energize, and elevate.

It's known for its selection of man-approved items, from beard care and cologne to local Center Hill Lake-themed merchandise, making it a go-to spot for gifts and personal shopping.

listings.title: Tammy J McLain Gallery
listings.description:
Tammy J McLain is an artist who believes creativity doesn’t require perfect tools — just a willingness to start. Her first creative memory was digging clay out of the backyard, and that mindset of using what’s on hand still shapes her mixed media and recycled art today.
She is also the creator of Wings A Flutter, a creative community offering art workshops and hands-on experiences where people can play, explore, and reconnect with their creativity. Through her work, Tammy encourages people of all ages to let go of perfection and simply create.

listings.title: Modern Metaphysicae
listings.description:
Modern Metaphysicae was founded in 2018 to help bring metaphysical knowledge, goods, and services to the Colorado Springs, Colorado and has since grown into a global community. Our founder and owner, Dustin the Modern Metaphysic Man, is an accomplished artist, metaphysician, and Tarot reader.   All throughout his life he has incorporated many different systems, modalities, religions, and philosophies into a life path and spiritual existence that works for him. Modern Metaphsicae was created as a place to share this vast knowledge, expertise, talent, and service with the world. 


In 2020 we opened a small metaphysical boutique. Located in the American Classic's Marketplace on Constitution and Academy in Colorado Springs. Specializing in a bespoke curated collection of handmade, local, sustainable, and fair-traded metaphysical goods and supplies. Including a wide variety of candles, oils, incense, herb bundles, crystals, décor, artwork, curiosities, and vintage pieces to enhance your spiritual practice and space.

Be sure to visit our YouTube channel for product reviews, free lessons, and chats about the latest happenings in the metaphysical world.

Omne Vetus Novum Iterum - Everything old is new again.

As always - remember, everyone is fighting a battle you know nothing about. So be kind, always.

listings.title: Generosity | Give Grace
listings.description:
At Generosity, our mission is to design and curate beautiful collections that inspire the art of gift giving while supporting artisans and small businesses.

What We Sell:

Gift Bar: Curated gifts from artisans and small businesses

Provisions: Entertaining essentials and everyday favorites

Give Grace: Jewelry, apparel, devotionals, Bibles, and gifts designed to spark conversations around faith

Grow in Grace: Faith-based gifts, books, and keepsakes for babies and children

A portion of all proceeds supports Give Grace, our sister nonprofit that provides comfort kits to women beginning breast cancer treatment. (supportgivegrace.org)

listings.description: Scent of the Sun is a family soap company based in Gallatin, Tennessee, and operating throughout the Greater Nashville Area. We started our business in 2013 with a passion for handmade, vegan creations that combine our love for beautiful designs and rich fragrances with a love for animals that manifests itself in our cruelty-free ingredients. We create and package our creations by hand, and our soapmaking philosophy is simple: to create nourishing bath goods that are as refreshing as they are beautiful.

listings.title: Naturally Inspired Scents
listings.description: Naturally Inspired Scents offers a diverse range of natural and organic aromatherapy products, bath and body essentials, and thoughtful gifts for every occasion. Our carefully curated selection emphasizes wellness and self-care, featuring soothing scents and high-quality skincare designed to enhance your daily rituals. Celebrate every moment with our unique offerings, perfect for both personal indulgence and memorable gifting.

listings.title: Spice Spice Baby
listings.description: We have been in business for eight years. We produce award winning  custom blended spices, dry soup mixes that are crockpot or stove top ready, and elevated Ramen kits. All of our products are additive, preservative, and gluten-free. Our products are perfect for both anyone who loves to cook and also anybody who doesn’t know how to cook and needs a little spice in their life. Our crockpot ready soups are great for anybody on the go and feed the whole family comfortably. Our Ramen serve two comfortably and are fresh fun and like nothing you will find on the grocery store shelves.

listings.title: Mark-It Gifts
listings.description:
Mark-It Gifts

We are a handmade gift company that mainly caters to men’s gifts. 

We sell mainly men’s gift ideas. Whiskey, bourbon, and beer-centric items for function and decoration. Everything is engraved with clever or witty expressions but, can be personalized if desired. We have slate, wood, and leatherette coasters, wooden and leatherette bottle opener, cocktail smoking kits and whiskey stones and rocks glasses, cigar holders and cutters, engraved golfing divot repair tools and golf bag tags.  

We sell clever baseball style hats with engraved patches as well as beanie caps, engraved and personalized metal coated  and sublimated tumblers, t-shirts adorned with humorous expressions and images geared toward husbands, dads, brothers, and grandfathers, wood and metal engraved minimalist wallets, wood handled pocket knives that have been engraved and can be customized. 

Wooden beard brushes and combs that are engraved with clever expressions onto them, several different kinds of cutting boards and serving trays. They come in a variety of shapes and types of wood. 

In addition to the men’s items, we have limited women’s clothing items which includes matching mom and kids hats and other gift options.  

We offer holiday matching shirts for Dads, Moms and children. For children, we have limited apparel with several items to match Mom and Dad, stocking stuffers such as wooden pocket hugs, engraved pencils, and acrylic dry erase “games on the go” for holiday car rides, hand painted wooden earrings. 

National and state park maps as well as 50 states travel maps and a golf course checklist. We have miscellaneous home decor too.  These are made with wood and acrylic. 

We make hand painted wooden earrings and acrylic earrings, with so many fun designs and shapes as well. 

We make many different Christmas tree ornaments and holiday decorations. We make them from wood and from acrylic. We also have laser engraved leatherette patches in Christmas stockings.

We also make and sell our own beard balms, beard oils, lotion sticks. Scented oils. Handmade soaps. 

We make self care products for women that include handmade soaps, lotion bars, shaving soap, perfume oils and sugar scrubs. 

We make room spray air fresheners for the house and oil diffuser suit fresheners for your car. 

We also offer handmade candles and a wide variety of scented wax melts in many colors and fun shapes as well as floral scented flower shapes.

listings.title: Starshine Stitches
listings.description: Crochet plushies, dish cloths scrubbies and sweeper covers. Crochet hooks, amigurumi sewing sticks and felt eyes for plushies.

listings.title: Inspirational Arts
listings.description: My art is my handwriting, and I create original designs out of hand-printed Bible verses. Each design contains 2-4 verses of Scripture that send a message pertaining to the word they are in. Art with a message. Our products include prints, cards, tote bags and our specialty line of pillowcases called Resting on His Word.  Help us spread the Word!

listings.title: JanieGeez Designs
listings.description:
At JanieGeez Design, every piece is made with heart, inspired by the simple beauty of farmhouse living. What started as a love for creating has grown into a collection of handcrafted items designed to bring warmth, charm, and a personal touch into your everyday life.

From cozy quilted accessories to thoughtfully designed home décor, each item is carefully handmade with attention to detail and a passion for timeless style. You’ll find pieces that are not only beautiful, but practical—made to be used, loved, and enjoyed in the moments that matter most.

Our collection includes farmhouse-inspired home décor, quilted essentials, lightweight wood earrings, and custom tumblers—each one created to add a little extra joy to your home, your outfit, or your daily routine.

At the heart of JanieGeez Design is a belief in simple things: quality craftsmanship, meaningful details, and the kind of charm that never goes out of style. Whether you’re decorating your space, finding the perfect gift, or treating yourself, we’re so glad you’re here.

listings.title: Grace + Poise Jewelry
listings.description: Grace + Poise jewelry is thoughtfully designed in Texas using hand-selected gemstones and carefully curated elements to create timeless, feminine pieces.

listings.title: Written by Maria
listings.description: Handlettered + creative goods business created to spread joy and encouragement! Stationery, Apparel, stickers + more!

listings.title: Apothecary Blends
listings.description: Apothecary Blends is where tea meets magic. Each handcrafted blend is thoughtfully created with high-quality herbs and teas, designed to not only taste beautiful but to feel transformative. Our signature sparkle brings a touch of wonder to every cup, turning simple moments into rituals worth savoring. Whether you’re seeking calm, clarity, or a little enchantment, Apothecary Blends invites you to slow down, indulge your senses, and rediscover the joy of tea.

listings.title: Old Farm Charm
current_locations: Coming soon Delaware Antique Mall (2nd floor) Delaware, Ohio
Marsells Vintage and Antiques Edison, Ohio
listings.description: Old Farm Charm is your go-to destination for enchanting home decor that seamlessly blends rustic elegance with timeless style. We curate a diverse collection of handcrafted pieces and vintage-inspired treasures, helping you create warm and inviting spaces that reflect your unique personality. Discover the perfect touch to elevate your home with our charming and thoughtfully selected decor items.

listings.title: Alaina & Co
listings.description:
My primary goal is to design luxurious candles that offer both stunning aesthetics and captivating scents, all while using the finest quality ingredients. I firmly believe that scents have a unique power to evoke memories and emotions, and each fragrance in my collection tells a personal story from my life.

To ensure a sustainable and eco-friendly approach, I use 100% soy wax derived from American-grown soybeans. This not only provides a clean burn but also contributes to a healthier environment. I carefully select a range of sustainably sourced cotton and wooden wicks, further emphasizing my commitment to responsible sourcing.

One of the core values of Alaina & Co. is our dedication to ethical practices. Our candles are petroleum-free, cruelty-free, phthalate-free, and entirely vegan, ensuring that every aspect of our products aligns with our values. Each candle is meticulously hand-poured and labeled, showcasing the attention to detail and craftsmanship that goes into every creation.

When you light an Alaina & Co. candle, you're not just igniting a flame; you're immersing yourself in a complete sensory experience. From the luxurious containers that adorn your space to the enchanting aromas that envelop your home, our candles are designed to indulge and delight your senses. Experience the difference with Alaina & Co. candles and treat yourself to a truly extraordinary ambiance.

listings.title: The Chromagic Dream Lab
listings.description: The Chromagic Dream Lab offers handmade coloring products, personalized gifts, party favors, and seasonal items for birthdays, holidays, family celebrations, and other special occasions. From giant coloring banners and coloring placemats to handmade crayons and paint kits, we create fun, colorful products for kids and personalized gifts for every occasion. Based in San Antonio, TX.

listings.title: Modish Aura Designs, Permanent Jewelry
listings.description: Permanent Jewelry

listings.title: MKS MIMINOO
listings.description: MKS Miminoo caters to modern families with a range of trendy, reusable, and versatile products. Our customizable offerings are designed to simplify your daily routines. Crafted from premium, safe, and long-lasting materials like silicone and organic cotton, our collection includes everything from our bestsellers Silicone coloring mats, stylish dinnerware and home decor to fashionable apparel, jewelry and accessories and educational toys. Discover our innovative, exclusive, and practical products that effortlessly blend convenience with trendine

listings.title: Virgo Moon Crafts
listings.description: Bringing fun into your mystical journey! Selling crystals, tarot, incense, jewelry, accessories, home goods and much more.

listings.title: SOCIAL FLY
listings.description:
Social Fly is a heart-led boutique built on the special bond between a mom and daughter who share a love for fashion, community, and creating something meaningful together. What started as a shared dream has grown into a space where style meets connection, offering carefully curated pieces that help women feel confident, comfortable, and uniquely themselves.

With a blend of classic taste and modern trends, this duo brings two generations of style into every collection. Their passion goes beyond clothing, they’re dedicated to creating a welcoming shopping experience, whether you’re visiting in person or browsing online. At Social Fly, every item is chosen with intention, and every customer is treated like part of the family.

More than just a boutique, Social Fly is a reflection of love, hard work, and the joy of building something together.

listings.title: The Steeped Leaf
listings.description: Organic Loose Leaf Teas and Tea Ware

listings.title: Texas UpCycle
listings.description: Stacy is a proud 5th generation Texan, and after making art glass for 12 years, she began experimenting with creating artful products from recycled bottles. After developing innovative products in 2015 she formed Texas UpCycle and now transforms recycled bottles into one of a kind bowls, garden art, rainchains, drinking glasses, planters, homeware, and jewelry. UpCycled Topo Chico bottles made into drinking glasses are always a customer favorite!  Our products are all made by hand with love in our studio in San Antonio, Texas. “ I love to go to work each day and create beauty from the discarded.”

listings.title: ChickRocks
listings.description: ChickRocks, a Latina-owned small business dedicated to spreading joy and big smiles to pet owners and their beloved companions! Our passion drives us to offer top-notch pet accessories and toys designed to delight both pets and their owners. We have a diverse selection of unique bandanas, bows, novelty toys, and other pet accessories. Our furry friends deserve the best, and we're here to deliver happiness tail-waggingly!

listings.title: Auntie ATX
listings.description:
Auntie ATX is a multi-service, heart-led business supporting families and community events throughout Austin, TX.

We specialize in in-home childcare, overnight newborn care, and event-based services, offering a calm, safe, and engaging environment for children of all ages. Our approach is neuro-affirming, attentive, and rooted in creating comfort and trust for both kids and parents.

For events, Auntie ATX offers professional face painting for festivals, private parties, and community gatherings—bringing a fun, artistic element that guests of all ages can enjoy.

In addition, Auntie ATX features a line of handmade goods and gifts, including bath soaks, simmer pots, seasoned blends, and small-batch home items—perfect for thoughtful gifting or everyday comfort.

Whether supporting a family at home or enhancing a community event, Auntie ATX is built on care, creativity, and connection.

Services Offered
In-home childcare
Overnight newborn care
Babysitting (short-term & recurring)
Event childcare
Face painting (parties, festivals, private events)
Handmade gifts & goods

listings.title: Healthy Life Happy Life
listings.description:
Healthy Life Happy Life boutique shops have been located inside area DFW Texas Painted Tree locations. With the recent unexpected closure of these stores, we are looking for new opportunities to share these unique products! Please follow our facebook page for updates on markets & events where we'll be set up in the coming months as well as new store locations and online shopping options! 

We offer unique items that are handmade/homemade, organic/toxin free, positive/uplifting & support a holistically healthy lifestyle!.. in additions to finding where to shop our unique collections, you can also contact us on our Healthy Life Happy Life facebook page to ask questions, request new items & share the love!

Healthy Life Happy Life carries a variety of products including natural fiber clothing, custom cotton jackets and purses from Nepal, unique jewelry, household decor, NATURAL LIFE products, tongue drums (aka panda drums) toxin free body care and household care, molten glass and driftwood bowls & vases, beeswax candles, steel drum art, plants, mini planters, wind chimes and wind spinners, metal yard art, fun plant related signage, and so much more!

Whether you're shopping for a holiday, celebrating a milestone, or just treating yourself, our collections are thoughtfully curated with a mix of trending designs, seasonal favorites, and meaningful pieces. We also offer custom creations to bring your vision to life, making each item as unique as you are.

I was in the PT for almost 7 years and I hope all of my dedicated customers will return to find me still selling what they love!

listings.description: Eternal Earth Gems & Candles, LLC is a “rock shop.”  We make and sell a large variety of items all related to rocks/gems/crystals including various gem candles & wax melts, towers, spheres, free forms, clusters, jewelry including necklaces, bracelets, earrings and rings.  We also sell gem trees, keychains, magnets, wine stoppers, candle holders, pendulums, chess sets, wine glasses, bookends, lamps, carved animals, wind chimes, loose gems, break-open geodes, butterflies, handmade soaps, hair accessories, facial rollers and GuaShas, suncatchers, car diffusers, t-shirts, chocolate rocks, rock candy, etc.

listings.description: Glam Girl Interiors - your luxury floral haven! Our dedication to detail and beauty is evident in each floral design we offer. listings.description: We are a husband and wife team working together for ten years now to build our dream into a small business. Our goal is to provide quality handmade home decor pieces at an affordable price. Some of our most popular items are our canvas prints and wood signs.

listings.title: Say it Simply Designs
listings.description: At Say It Simply Designs, we specialize in high-quality custom embroidery, personalized apparel, and boutique-style clothing designed to fit your unique style or brand. Whether you need just one item or a large bulk order, we offer no minimums and can accommodate everything from company apparel and team uniforms to family gatherings, girls trips, school spirit wear, clubs, and more. We create custom pieces on a wide range of products including clothing, totes, hats, backpacks, duffle bags, beach towels, bath and kitchen towels, and jackets. Using a combination of embroidery, full-color DTF printing, screen printing, and vinyl, we bring your ideas to life with detail, durability, and a polished finish.  Shipping available!

listings.title: The Lovely Closet
listings.description: The Lovely Closet is a women’s clothing boutique offering curated, elevated casual styles for the woman who wants to look good and feel even better!

listings.title: Regina Lynn Design
listings.description:
Every piece I make starts with my hands, not a machine. I specialize in hand-stamped metalwork jewelry, accessories, and ornaments — each one personalized, one letter or design at a time, using a metal stamp and hammer. There’s no automation here, just careful craftsmanship and a lot of patience.

Beyond jewelry, I bring my hand-drawn and digitally crafted designs to life through professional graphic design programs. Once the art is ready, I use sublimation printing to make the colors pop on shirts, blankets, pillows, kitchen towels, tumblers, and more. My shirts go through a four-step acid wash process, so no two are ever quite the same. Whether it’s a cozy throw blanket, a set of ornaments, a one-of-a-kind hair clip, or custom drinkware, everything is made with an eye for detail and a love for the unique.

listings.title: Bearpaw Mixes
listings.description: We make soup, dip, and bread mixes all only taking one ingredient to make at home.   We are a family run,  women run company and we do everything ourselves.

listings.title: Lexi Jo Boutique
listings.description: Lexi Jo is a curated women’s boutique focused on effortless style, everyday comfort, and standout pieces you’ll reach for again and again. We bring together a mix of on-trend fashion and timeless staples—think the cutest on-trend tops, cute and comfortable dresses, and the perfect accessories to complete any look. We also have a wide range of carefully curated gifts!

listings.title: Freckled Fem Fashion & Gifts
listings.description:
Sunny, optimistic, and approachable with a dash of playful charm.

Freckled Fem Fashion and Gifts is a family owned business that speaks to those who value their freedom, their country, the joy of outdoor living, the comfort of a well-decorated home, and the thrill of finding that perfect wardrobe piece.

Our brand is like a warm summer day - bright, cheerful, and inviting.

We're your friendly neighborhood online boutique, always ready with a smile and a helpful suggestion. When shopping with us, imagine you're just chatting with a good friend over sweet tea on the porch - keep it casual, keep it positive, and don't forget to sprinkle in some of that freckle-faced charm!

We're all about helping you feel like part of the family, so let's make sure every experience reflects just that!
